name: Determine Food Supply Chain Transportation Policy
description: Process of determining transportation policy to meet demand, minimize costs, and ensure food safety and quality in the food supply chain, considering critical control points, allergen management, and cold chain integrity
notes: Food safety decisions at critical control points require validated logic and real-time monitoring. Automation should ensure data integrity, security, and compliance with regulatory requirements. Temperature control, allergen management, and recall procedures must be integrated into the transportation policy.
